prompt:
Goal: Create a warm, romantic café advertisement photo for a seasonal shaved ice dessert, in a dreamy cottagecore style. The scene should feel like a sunlit flower-filled French-Japanese café terrace, with soft golden backlight, shallow depth of field, lace, daisies, honey tones, and antique cream paper signage.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 composition, photorealistic editorial food photography with a delicate fairytale atmosphere. Use warm beige, ivory, pale yellow, blush pink, and soft green as the main palette.

Layout: Place a huge ornate glass bowl of shaved ice in the lower center foreground. Behind it on the right, seat a young blonde woman in a cream lace dress, wearing a daisy-and-pink-flower crown and holding a gold spoon near her face. Her face is intentionally covered by a flat opaque tan square censor block centered over the facial area. On the left side, place two vintage framed menu signs: one tall sign at upper left and one smaller sign below it. Add one small paper tag and one wax seal near the bottom left. Add one small white rabbit figurine or plush on the lower right beside the dessert. Surround everything with abundant daisies, baby’s breath, vines, and rustic wood window frames.

Subject details: The dessert is an oversized mound of milk shaved ice in a clear scalloped glass bowl on a matching saucer. Top it with one round scoop of pale vanilla milk ice cream, white daisy flowers, small yellow honey or fruit jelly cubes, pale peach mochi-like balls, mint leaves, and sparkling syrup droplets. The shaved ice should look fluffy, crystalline, creamy, and luxurious.

Text content: Include exactly 3 visible text items. 1) Upper left framed sign: large text “CAFÉ Fraise Étoilée”, smaller Japanese text “カフェ・フレーズ・エトワレ”, and the slogan “Blooming with my own light.” 2) Lower left framed menu sign: Japanese seasonal menu text for honey milk shaved ice, including “季節限定”, “花冠はちみつのミルクかき氷”, “〜やさしい光に包まれて〜”, several small ingredient lines, and the price “¥2,200(税込)”. 3) Small bottom-left paper tag: “Blooming with my own light.” with a tiny heart doodle.

Style constraints: Photorealistic but idealized, high-end café campaign image, ornate antique frames, lace tablecloth, soft bokeh, glowing window light, no modern objects, no extra people, no watermark. Keep the face-covering censor block visible and plain tan. Use the café name CAFÉ Fraise Étoilée, the dessert name 花冠はちみつのミルクかき氷, the price ¥2,200(税込), the slogan Blooming with my own light., and the flower theme daisies and soft pink blossoms.
